creator: mizhka@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 189350
SVN patch

Hi,

Here is minimalistic patch for sysutils/flashrom 1.0. 
Here is announce of release: https://flashrom.org/Flashrom/1.0

This patch works for me on FreeBSD 12-current.

NOTE: patches from files folder is accepted by upstream, but not included into release 1.0. So let's keep them for a while.
